faq.question: How do I customise my order?
faq.answer: Once you place your order, we'll WhatsApp you to finalise all details — from colours to quotes and everything in between.

faq.question: Can I request a theme or custom design?
faq.answer: Of course! Share your ideas or Pinterest inspiration. Please note that major changes cannot be made once the creation process has begun.

faq.question: Do I need to pay in advance?
faq.answer: Yes. A minimum of 50% advance payment is required to confirm your order and begin the creation process. The remaining amount must be paid before dispatch.

faq.question: Can I change the details later?
faq.answer: We recommend finalising everything upfront, as edits are not always possible once the process starts.

faq.question: What's the delivery timeline?
faq.answer: Standard orders take 10–14 working days. Express delivery is available at an additional charge and only if pre-approved by us.

faq.question: Do you accept COD or prepaid only?
faq.answer: All orders are prepaid. We accept UPI transactions.

faq.question: Do you ship internationally?
faq.answer: Yes, we do! International shipping is available. Please reach out to us for rates based on your location and order weight.

faq.question: Can I cancel or change an order after placing it?
faq.answer: Since each piece is made-to-order, cancellations or modifications are not possible once the order is confirmed. Please double-check all details before placing your order.

faq.question: What if my item arrives damaged?
faq.answer: We take utmost care in packaging every order. However, if your item arrives damaged, please contact us within 24 hours of delivery. An unboxing video is mandatory showing the sealed package being opened — this helps us verify and resolve the issue quickly. Without an unboxing video, we may not be able to process replacement or support requests.

faq.question: What if I entered the wrong address?
faq.answer: If a parcel is returned due to an incorrect address or contact number, additional re-shipping charges will apply. Please ensure all details are accurate while placing your order.

faq.question: Do you take bulk or corporate orders?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We love curating for events, weddings, and brands. Reach out to us for bulk pricing and custom concepts.

faq.question: Can you help me curate a hamper or gift?
faq.answer: Yes! Share your occasion and budget, and we'll help you create something thoughtful and personal.

faq.question: Is my personal data and shared content safe?
faq.answer: Your trust matters deeply to us. Any photos, references, personal details, or customisation inputs shared with us are used solely for creating your order. We do not share, sell, or distribute your personal information to any third parties. In some cases, we may wish to showcase your order on social media, our website, or portfolio — but we will always respect your privacy. If you prefer your order or images are not shared publicly, just let us know at any point and we will completely honour your preference.

faq.question: Will my order look exactly like the reference shared?
faq.answer: Each piece is handmade and unique, so while we stay true to your reference and brief, slight variations are a natural part of the process. This is what makes your piece truly one of a kind.

faq.question: Still have questions?
faq.answer: Ping us on WhatsApp or drop an email at smalltime.artiste@gmail.com — we'll be happy to help!
